evals.prompt: Check test coverage and fix any gaps.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs coverage check, identifies uncovered lines, and proposes meaningful tests.
assertions: Agent runs `make test-cov-check` or equivalent pytest-cov command
Agent examines the coverage report to identify uncovered lines
Agent proposes tests for uncovered code rather than adding pragma comments
Agent does NOT add trivial or empty tests solely to raise the number

evals.prompt: The CI is failing because test coverage dropped below 80%. Fix it.
evals.expected_output: Agent identifies which lines lost coverage, writes targeted tests, and re-verifies.
assertions: Agent runs `make test-cov-check` to reproduce the failure
Agent identifies specific uncovered lines from the report
Agent writes tests in the corresponding tests/test_<module>.py file
Agent re-runs `make test-cov-check` to verify the fix
Agent does NOT lower the coverage threshold in pyproject.toml

evals.prompt: Some tests are failing after my code change. Also coverage is below threshold.
evals.expected_output: Agent fixes test failures FIRST, then addresses coverage gaps.
assertions: Agent fixes existing test failures before addressing coverage
Agent fixes production code (not tests) when existing tests break
Agent addresses coverage only after all tests pass
